commit_scope: Seed the Anything-Arrives Room concept and its substrate trace companion.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'

python3 scripts/sync_kb_to_db.py lc-grammar-is-the-universal-recipe lc-one-kernel-many-tongues lc-traces-teach-the-recipe lc-observer-pays-the-trace lc-recipe-branching-sense lc-the-recipe-remembers-its-source

curl -sS --max-time 10 https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/concepts/lc-anything-arrives-room | jq '{id, name, hz: .sacred_frequency.hz, story_chars: (.story_content | length), has_load_bearing_sentence: (.story_content | contains("A signal becomes knowable when its effects can be followed."))}'

curl -sS --max-time 10 https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/concepts/lc-anything-arrives-room/edges | jq '{analogous: ([.[] | select(.type == "analogous-to")] | length), peers: [.[] | select(.type == "analogous-to") | if .from == "lc-anything-arrives-room" then .to else .from end] | sort}'
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
local_validation.summary: The Anything-Arrives Room concept was added as the public-safe loosened frame for universal translation: translation makes contact traceable. The companion Form file records the trace schema plus concrete cases for audio, code, dream fragment, CSV, gesture, and silence. INDEX and LOG edges landed with the concept. The concept and its previously missing public cross-reference peers synced to the public KB graph; the public concept endpoint returns hz 741, 7113 story characters, the load-bearing sentence, and 13 analogous edges.

phase_gate.reason: Local and public DB proof for docs-only KB work has passed; CI and merge/deploy validation are pending until PR flow completes.
